Custom Refrigerator Magnets

Professional Quality Magnets for Business & Personal Use

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size: Choose your refrigerator magnet dimensions Quantity: Select number of magnets needed Production Time: 1-5 business day options available Cut Style: Die cut, square cut, or rounded corners Upload Design: Add your custom artwork or logo Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Custom Refrigerator Magnets?

Custom refrigerator magnets are personalized magnetic promotional items made from durable vinyl material with a strong magnetic backing. These versatile marketing tools stick securely to refrigerators, filing cabinets, and other metal surfaces, making them perfect for business advertising, promotional giveaways, and personal keepsakes. Our refrigerator magnets feature full-color digital printing with a protective laminate finish that resists fading and moisture damage. See also [custom holographic vinyl material](https://www.decals.com/custom-holographic-vinyl-material).

Businesses commonly use custom car magnet alternatives like refrigerator magnets for restaurant menus, real estate contact cards, service reminders, and brand awareness campaigns. The strong magnetic hold ensures your message stays visible on metal surfaces while the weather-resistant construction provides long-lasting durability for both indoor and outdoor applications.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Order Custom Refrigerator Magnets

Design Methods for Refrigerator Magnets

Create your custom refrigerator magnets using our intuitive online design tool or upload your own artwork files. Our design interface allows you to add text, images, and graphics while previewing your magnet in real-time. For professional results, upload vector files in EPS or PDF format to ensure crisp printing quality at any size.

Payment Process

All refrigerator magnet orders require full payment before production begins. We accept major credit cards including Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. Check payments are also accepted and must be received prior to manufacturing your custom magnets.

Live Order Tracking for Magnets

Monitor your refrigerator magnet order progress with our Live Order Tracking system. After placing your order, you'll receive a unique tracking number via email that provides real-time updates from order approval through delivery. This proprietary system keeps you informed at every stage of production and shipping.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Refrigerator Magnet Production & Turnaround Times

Our flexible production schedule offers refrigerator magnet turnaround times from 1 to 5 business days, allowing you to choose the option that best fits your timeline and budget. Production time begins once your artwork is approved and payment is processed.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Rush refrigerator magnet orders with same-day and next-day turnaround options. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will begin production the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available - contact our customer service team for availability and pricing.

2 Business Day Express Production

Fast refrigerator magnet production ideal for urgent promotional campaigns and time-sensitive projects. This express option balances speed with cost-effectiveness for most business applications requiring quick delivery.

3 Business Day Standard Production

Our most popular refrigerator magnet production option offering an optimal balance of speed and value. This standard turnaround works well for planned marketing campaigns and promotional events with moderate lead times.

5 Business Day Saver Production

Cost-effective refrigerator magnet production for orders with flexible deadlines. This economical option reduces costs while maintaining the same high-quality printing and materials used in our faster production options.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Cut Options for Refrigerator Magnets

Choose from three professional cutting options to achieve the perfect finish for your refrigerator magnets. All magnet orders include a protective laminate coating that enhances durability and print quality regardless of the cutting method selected.

Die Cut Refrigerator Magnets

Custom-shaped refrigerator magnets cut precisely to match your artwork outline. Die cutting creates unique promotional pieces that stand out from standard rectangular magnets. Perfect for logos, mascots, and distinctive brand shapes that maximize visual impact on refrigerators and metal surfaces.

Square Cut Refrigerator Magnets with Rounded Corners

Our standard cutting option features clean rectangular edges with slightly rounded corners for a professional appearance. This versatile cutting style works well for business cards, promotional messages, and contact information magnets while providing a polished, finished look.

Square Cut Refrigerator Magnets

Precision rectangular cutting with sharp, clean edges for a classic magnet appearance. Square cut refrigerator magnets maximize printable surface area and work well for text-heavy designs, menus, schedules, and informational content that requires clear readability.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Refrigerator Magnet Artwork Requirements

Preferred File Types for Magnets

Upload refrigerator magnet artwork in vector formats for optimal print quality. Adobe Illustrator EPS files and PDF documents produce the sharpest results, especially for text and logos. Convert all fonts to outlines or curves before submitting to prevent font substitution issues during production.

Additional File Formats Accepted

High-resolution raster files are also accepted for refrigerator magnet printing. Submit JPEG, TIFF, or PNG files at 300 DPI minimum resolution for best results. Maximum file size is 100 MB, accommodating most professional artwork and photography needs.

File Setup Tips for Refrigerator Magnets

Create artwork proportionate to your final magnet size to ensure accurate scaling during production. Include bleed areas only when necessary and clearly indicate cut lines for die-cut refrigerator magnets. Avoid flattening layered files to maintain editing flexibility for any required adjustments.

Design Services for Custom Magnets

Professional artwork recreation services are available for refrigerator magnet orders starting at $15 for simple logo recreation. Complex designs may require custom quotes. We retain recreated vector artwork files for future orders and can provide source files for additional fees upon request.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Refrigerator Magnet Shipping Information

Shipping Methods for Magnets

Refrigerator magnet orders ship via UPS Ground, UPS Next Day Air, and USPS Priority Mail depending on your selected delivery speed and location. Standard ground shipping typically delivers within 2-7 business days after production completion, while expedited options provide faster delivery for time-sensitive promotional campaigns.

Shipping Time Expectations

Total delivery time for refrigerator magnets includes both production time and shipping transit. Production time begins after artwork approval and payment processing, while shipping time starts when your completed magnets leave our facility. Track your shipment using the provided tracking number for real-time delivery updates.

Important Shipping Notes for Magnetic Products

Refrigerator magnets require special packaging to prevent magnetic interference during shipping. Our protective packaging ensures magnets arrive in perfect condition without damage to the magnetic backing or printed surface. International shipping options are available with extended delivery times and customs considerations.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

How to Apply Custom Refrigerator Magnets

Preparing the Surface

Clean the metal surface thoroughly before applying refrigerator magnets to ensure maximum magnetic adhesion. Remove grease, dust, and residue using a mild cleaner and allow the surface to dry completely. Smooth, flat metal surfaces provide the strongest magnetic hold for long-lasting placement.

Applying Refrigerator Magnets

Position your magnet against the clean metal surface and press firmly across the entire back surface. The magnetic backing will create an immediate bond with ferrous metals including refrigerators, filing cabinets, and steel surfaces. Adjust placement as needed since magnets can be repositioned without losing adhesive strength.

Removing and Repositioning Magnets

Lift refrigerator magnets by grasping an edge and peeling away from the metal surface. The magnetic bond releases easily without leaving residue or damaging either the magnet or the surface. Clear stickers offer permanent adhesive alternatives when magnetic attachment isn't suitable for your application.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Design Your Perfect Refrigerator Magnets Today

Create custom refrigerator magnets that showcase your business, promote your services, or preserve special memories. Our professional printing process delivers vibrant colors and sharp details that make your message impossible to ignore. Whether you need promotional giveaways for trade shows, restaurant menu magnets for takeout customers, or personalized photo magnets for gifts, our customization options ensure perfect results every time.

Start designing your refrigerator magnets using our online tool or upload your ready-to-print artwork files. With production times as fast as one business day and comprehensive shipping options, your custom magnets will be ready when you need them. Our quality guarantee ensures every magnet meets professional standards for color accuracy, durability, and magnetic strength.

Looking for complementary promotional products? Explore our circle labels for additional branding opportunities or browse clear labels for versatile adhesive applications. Contact our customer service team at 320-391-5250 for volume pricing, custom quotes, and design assistance.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Refrigerator Magnet FAQs

What materials are refrigerator magnets made from?

Our custom refrigerator magnets are made from durable vinyl material with a strong magnetic backing and protective laminate finish. The vinyl surface accepts high-quality digital printing while the magnetic backing provides reliable adhesion to metal surfaces. The laminate coating protects against moisture, fading, and wear for long-lasting promotional use.

What metals will refrigerator magnets stick to?

Refrigerator magnets adhere strongly to ferrous metals including steel refrigerators, filing cabinets, metal doors, and appliances. They will not stick to aluminum, copper, brass, or other non-ferrous metals. Test magnetic adhesion on stainless steel surfaces as some grades may have reduced magnetic attraction.

How long do custom refrigerator magnets last?

High-quality refrigerator magnets typically last 3-5 years with normal indoor use and 1-2 years in outdoor conditions. The laminate coating protects against UV fading while the magnetic backing maintains strength over time. Proper surface preparation and clean application extend magnet lifespan significantly.

Can refrigerator magnets be made waterproof?

Yes, our refrigerator magnets feature water-resistant construction with sealed edges that prevent moisture damage. The laminate coating provides additional protection against humidity and condensation commonly found around refrigerators and outdoor metal surfaces.

What sizes are available for custom refrigerator magnets?

Custom refrigerator magnets can be produced in virtually any size from small business cards to large promotional pieces. Popular sizes include 2"x3.5" business card magnets, 4"x6" postcard magnets, and custom die-cut shapes. Contact us for specific size requirements and dimensional limitations.

How strong is the magnetic hold on refrigerator magnets?

Our refrigerator magnets use high-strength magnetic backing that securely holds multiple sheets of paper while remaining easy to remove and reposition. The magnetic strength is calibrated to provide reliable adhesion without being difficult to handle or potentially damaging to sensitive surfaces.
